changelog: NEW: Structure validators for DOCX/XLSX/XLSM/PPTX/DOC/XLS/XLK/PPT, PDF, ZIP/RAR archives, RAW (CR2/NEF/ARW/DNG), TIFF, MP4/MOV/M4V — CRC checks, stream decompression, sector-aligned zero-block detection
Full checkpoint & resume for EVERY step (1, 2, 3a, 3b) including mid-step progress, not just step boundaries — survives Stop and power loss with per-file granularity
Steps 1+2 (pattern + header) can run in a single combined pass when both enabled — fewer disk reads, fewer backend calls on large scans
"Cancel, start over" now immediately starts a fresh scan instead of just clearing the checkpoint
Fixed: files resumed after Stop are now correctly moved to destination folders (previously skipped)
Fixed: checkpoint timer leak after Stop that could keep re-writing stale progress
Fixed: files matching both pattern and bad-signature no longer queued for two destinations at once
Fixed: reduced false positives on image/PDF corruption detection (EXIF padding, sector-alignment requirement)
Auto-export of image/structure analysis results (image_analysis.txt) on scan completion
Debug console output and CSV diagnostic logs are now compiled out of Release builds (test builds unaffected)
